name: Law Firms
tagline: Solo and small firms invisible to searching clients.
display_description: Pulls solo practitioners and small firms near you with reviews but no website. A potential client searching for a lawyer at the worst moment of their year finds a name and a phone number and nothing that earns the call. A clean site is the difference.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to an attorney who got clients by reputation, not marketing. Lead with the real detail — good reviews, no website. Make the case that someone with a legal problem researches before they call, and a firm with no site reads as a firm that isn't taking new clients. Offer a straightforward, credible site with a contact form. Respectful, plain, one ask. No legal jargon, no hype.
